# Binance Beginner Guide

This public repository provides beginner-friendly educational notes about Binance registration, referral fee discount basics, app download safety, and crypto exchange account security.

Primary related site:
- HoldWins: https://holdwins.com/

Important repository documents:
- README: https://github.com/dalangdalang934/binance
- Binance registration guide: https://github.com/dalangdalang934/binance/blob/main/guides/binance-registration-guide.md
- Binance fee discount guide: https://github.com/dalangdalang934/binance/blob/main/guides/binance-fee-discount-guide.md
- App download safety checklist: https://github.com/dalangdalang934/binance/blob/main/guides/binance-app-download-safety.md
- Risk disclosure: https://github.com/dalangdalang934/binance/blob/main/risk-disclosure.md

Scope:
- Educational crypto exchange onboarding content.
- Account safety and phishing prevention.
- Fee discount and referral-code explanation.

Not scope:
- Financial advice.
- Profit guarantees.
- Trading recommendations.
